title: Split SQL Dumps for Migration Plugins (When They Fail)
description: Migration plugins can choke on large SQL files. Split them to keep migrations reliable.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: Plugins often have hidden size limits. Splitting keeps migrations predictable.
Related: **WordPress Database Too Large to Import?**

content.title: Keep migrations reliable
content.text: Split large WordPress SQL dumps before import.

faq.question: Do plugins support partial imports?
faq.answer: Some do, but many fail silently. Splitting is safer.
